headline: Peru’s interim president defers $3.5 billion fighter jet purchase to the next government
summary: LIMA, Peru — Peruvian interim President José María Balcázar has deferred the decision to purchase 24 fighter jets valued at $3.5 billion to his successor who will emerge after a runoff in the...

headline: Wall Street Rally Faces Key Test As Earnings, Geopolitics Drive Week Ahead
summary: A strong market rally faces its next test as a busy earnings week and ongoing geopolitical risks take center stage.

headline: Lockheed Martin’s US$1b Venture Fund Reshapes Its Defense Growth Path
summary: Lockheed Martin expanded its venture capital arm, Lockheed Martin Ventures, from $400 million to $1 billion. The larger fund is intended to accelerate the development and deployment of advanced defense technologies. This is the largest increase since the fund was created and signals a focus on emerging technology tied to national security. For investors watching NYSE:LMT, this move comes with the stock at $592.19 and longer-term share performance of 19.1% year to date and 31.1% over the...

headline: Markets weigh optimism against uncertainty as Trump signals Iran breakthrough
summary: Investing.com -- Global financial markets and world leaders are grappling with a mix of cautious optimism and head-spinning confusion following President Donald Trump’s claims of a breakthrough in negotiations with Iran, including a full reopening of the critical Strait of Hormuz.

headline: 3 Industrials Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 12% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 5.4% return.
